title: Basic HTTP Server with Routes
description: Create an HTTP server that responds differently based on URL.
problemStatement:
Create a file `server.js` that starts an HTTP server on port 3000. Implement the following routes: - `GET /` → respond with HTML: `

Home Page

` - `GET /about` → respond with HTML: `

About Us

We are learning Node.js

` - Any other path → respond with status 404 and plain text '404 Not Found' Make sure to set the correct Content-Type headers. Test by visiting the URLs in your browser.
hints: Remember to call `res.end()` after writing the response.
expectedOutput: Home page at /, about page at /about, 404 for others.
